Team access

Invite people

Add teammates by name or email, or enter a custom invite.

@for (chip of chips; track chip.id) { {{ chip.label }} }
@if (isOpen) {
    @for (item of suggestions; track item.id; let i = $index) {
  • {{ item.label }} {{ item.value }}

Arrow keys navigate. Enter or comma adds. Backspace removes the last invite.

:host{display:block;min-height:100%}*{box-sizing:border-box}.page{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;background:#070b14;color:#e5e7eb;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}.card{width:min(100%,680px);min-width:0;display:grid;gap:16px;padding:22px;border:1px solid #243044;border-radius:18px;background:#0b1020;box-shadow:0 22px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.34)}.card-header{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:6px}.eyebrow{margin:0;color:#bef264;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}h1{margin:0;font-size:clamp(21px,4vw,28px);line-height:1.15}.subtitle{max-width:54ch;margin:0;color:#9ca3af;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}.combobox-shell{position:relative;min-width:0}.chip-field{min-width:0;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:13px;background:#070d1b;cursor:text}.chip-field:focus-within{border-color:#a3e635;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(163,230,53,.15)}.chip{max-width:100%;min-width:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:5px 9px 5px 11px;border:1px solid #334766;border-radius:999px;background:#17223a;color:#f1f5f9;font-size:13px}.chip-label{min-width:0;overflow-wrap:break-word}.chip-remove{flex:0 0 auto;display:grid;place-items:center;width:22px;height:22px;padding:0;border:0;border-radius:999px;background:transparent;color:#aab4c4;font-size:17px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer}.chip-remove:hover{background:#293650;color:#fff}.chip-input{min-width:140px;flex:1 1 180px;padding:5px 2px;border:0;outline:0;background:transparent;color:#f8fafc;font:inherit;font-size:14px}.chip-input::placeholder{color:#64748b}.chip-input:disabled{cursor:not-allowed;opacity:.7}.chip-input:focus-visible,.chip-remove:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #bef264;outline-offset:2px}.suggestions{position:absolute;z-index:20;top:calc(100% + 8px);left:0;right:0;max-height:274px;margin:0;padding:5px;overflow-y:auto;list-style:none;border:1px solid 0 auto;color:#cbd5e1;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.invite-limit.limit-reached{color:#fbbf24;font-weight:700}.visually-hidden{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0}@media(max-width:560px){.page{place-items:start
